_doc: Durable work backlog for the Computer Fund continuous loop. Drain highest-value pending item every wake.

items.desc: Weakest axis per self-audit: universe (health 0.67). 4 names tracked (target broader cross-section for cross-sectional lead-lag; PATH/CRM queued)
Weakest axis per self-audit: meta_improvement (health 0.6). self-audit exists=True but not yet on a schedule (should run hourly so no axis drifts)
Weakest axis per self-audit: signal (health 0.4). web_sentiment present=True tested=False; single source (no cross-source corroboration yet)
Weakest axis per self-audit: sim (health 0.3). sim present=True but UNUSED in the live verdict path (SIM-FIDELITY-1 open; dead weight unless wired or killed)
When any series reaches >=24 TIME-SPACED points, run leadlag_real.py for the AUTHORITATIVE verdict (EDGE or KILL) and record it in runs/.
items.notes: cron now feeds time-spaced points via capture_web_tick.py; NVDA at 13 (mostly burst). Need ~11+ more time-spaced.

items.desc: Make captures actually time-vary: widen/rotate queries + freshen corpus each tick (recency) so EWMA tracks real news drift instead of converging to a fixed point. Otherwise lead-lag is untestable.
items.notes: core blocker on a meaningful verdict

items.desc: Add 2-3 more battle-location names (cross-sectional lead-lag breadth).
